title: How to set up your institute
flow: Settings > Institute Settings > Branding > Roles > Invite Team
description: One-time foundational setup — institute name & logo / theme color / time zone / invite your first team members / assign roles. Covers everything you do once before anyone else logs in.

title: How to connect your payment gateway
flow: Settings > Payment Gateways > Razorpay/Stripe > Tax/GST > Invoice Template
description: Connect Razorpay or Stripe / set up GST or tax / pick your default gateway / design your invoice header & footer. Get ready to collect money.

title: How to connect your communication channels
flow: Settings > WhatsApp > Wati/Meta > Email SMTP > Exotel Telephony
description: Connect WhatsApp via Wati or Meta / connect SMTP for email / connect Exotel for click-to-call. Get all your outbound channels live.

title: How to create your first course end-to-end
flow: Courses > Create Course > Add Level > Add Session > Add Subject > Add Module > Add Chapter > Publish
description: Walk through the full course structure: course → level → session → subject → module → chapter → publish. The single most important admin flow.

title: How to add content to a course (PDF / video / quiz / coding)
flow: Courses > [Chapter] > Add Slide > PDF + Video + Quiz + Coding
description: Show how to add each major slide type (PDF / video lecture / quiz / coding problem) and how to reorder them. One video covers all slide types.

title: How to set drip rules and pricing for a course
description: Control when chapters unlock (time / completion) and set the price or installment plan for the course.

title: How to run your first live class
flow: Live Sessions > Create > Connect Zoom > Schedule > Recording > Attendance > Auto-Notes
description: Schedule a live session / authorize Zoom / record automatically / track attendance / auto-generate notes & quiz from the recording with Instructor Copilot.

title: How to create and run an assessment
flow: Assessments > Create > Add Questions > Set Duration > Enable Proctoring > Assign > Schedule > Publish Results
description: Complete assessment lifecycle: create / add questions from bank or AI / set timer / turn on proctoring / assign to a batch / schedule window / grade subjective answers / publish results.

title: How to use AI to create a question paper
flow: AI Center > VSmart > Question Paper from Document / Topic Questions / Paper Digitiser
description: Three AI ways to make a paper: upload a document → AI extracts questions / type a topic → AI generates questions / scan a handwritten paper → AI digitises it.

title: How to use AI to evaluate handwritten papers
flow: AI Center > VSmart Feedback > Upload Sheets > Review > Publish
description: Scan handwritten answer sheets / AI grades them / you review and adjust / publish results back to learners.

title: How to create an AI explainer video with Vimotion
flow: Vimotion > Create > Prompt or Deck > Edit > Embed in Course
description: Generate an AI-narrated explainer video from a prompt or slide deck / edit captions and voiceover / embed it into a course chapter.

title: How to capture leads from your website and ads
flow: Audience Manager > Create Form > Embed/Share > Connect Meta Lead Ads > Bulk Import
description: Three ways to capture leads: build a custom form and embed on your website / share via link or WhatsApp / connect Facebook Lead Ads for auto-import / bulk import a CSV of leads.

title: How to set up your lead pipeline
flow: Settings > Leads > Statuses + Tiers + Scoring + SLA
description: Configure custom lead statuses (your pipeline) / set up HOT/WARM/COLD tiers / configure lead scoring rules / set SLA so leads can't be ignored.

title: How to distribute leads across your counsellor team
flow: Settings > Leads > Pools > Create Pool > Add Members > Round Robin > Region/Schedule
description: Create a counsellor pool / add members / configure round-robin or region-based routing / set working-hour shifts.

title: How to work a lead day-in-the-life
flow: Audience Manager > [Lead] > View Profile > Add Note > Schedule Follow-up > WhatsApp/Email > Call > Update Status > Convert
description: The counsellor's daily workflow: open a lead / read profile + timeline / log a note / schedule follow-up / send WhatsApp or email / make a call (Exotel) / update status / mark as Converted.

title: How to use the full-screen lead profile overlay
flow: Audience Manager > [Lead] > Expand Icon > Section Nav
description: Open the 90vw full-screen profile / use the left nav to jump between sections / faster for deep review than the drawer.

title: How to create email and WhatsApp templates
flow: Settings > Templates > Email + WhatsApp > Submit Meta-approved
description: Create a reusable email template with merge fields / submit a Meta-approved WhatsApp template / use them in workflows.

title: How to build a lead nurture workflow
flow: Workflow > Create > Trigger > Send Email > Wait > Condition > Send WhatsApp > Schedule > Monitor
description: Build a multi-step automation in the visual editor: pick a trigger / send an email / wait 2 days / branch on lead score / send WhatsApp / schedule the workflow / monitor executions.

title: How to read your CRM reports
flow: Audience Manager > Reports > Conversion Funnel + Source ROI + Counsellor Performance
description: Where leads are dropping off in the funnel / which sources are giving the best ROI / how each counsellor is performing.

title: How to process applications and enquiries
flow: Admissions > Enquiries > Convert > Application > Assign Counsellor > Documents > Status > Communication
description: End-to-end admissions flow: enquiry comes in / convert to application / assign to counsellor / track document submission / track status / communicate with the applicant.

title: How to enroll learners and onboard them
flow: Manage Learners > Bulk Enroll/Invite > Portal Access > Welcome Email > Track
description: Bulk enroll from CSV or send invite links / grant portal access credentials / trigger the welcome flow / verify they logged in.

title: How to manage a learner's full profile
flow: Manage Learners > [Learner] > Overview + Progress + Tests + Payment + Communication + Files + Edit
description: Tour every tab of the learner side drawer: overview / progress / test history / payment history / communications / files / how to edit details.

title: How to handle fees from setup to collection
flow: Settings > Fee Management > Plan + Installments > Create Invoice > Payment Link > Track > Refund
description: Full payment lifecycle: set up a fee plan with installments / create an invoice for a learner / send a payment link via WhatsApp / track payment in logs / handle a refund.

title: How to create and apply coupon codes
flow: Settings > Coupons > Create > Expiry/Limit > Apply at Checkout
description: Issue a discount code / set expiry and usage limit / apply it on a learner's invoice. Useful for scholarship / promo / season-specific discounts.

title: How to manage student doubts
flow: Doubts > View > Assign to Instructor > Reply > Mark Resolved + SLA Config
description: How instructors handle the doubts queue: view incoming doubts / assign to the right instructor / reply with text or attachments / mark resolved / how to configure SLA so doubts don't get stuck.

title: How to read your admin dashboard and learner insights
flow: Dashboard > KPIs + Finance Summary > Learner Insights > Reports
description: Tour the admin dashboard / understand the KPI widgets / drill into Finance Summary / use Learner Insights to spot at-risk learners / generate a deep-dive report on one learner.

title: How to view assessment analytics
description: Question-wise difficulty / score distribution / attempt rate / identifying which questions need rework / export to CSV.

title: How to set up sub-organizations and switch between them
flow: Settings > Sub-Org > Create > Add Admins > Org Switcher
description: Set up a child branch under your main institute / give it its own admins / switch between sub-orgs from the top bar. Only needed for multi-branch institutes.

title: How to use admin activity logs
description: Full audit trail of admin actions / filter by user or action / export for compliance reviews.

description: Create your account using email or phone.

description: Complete OTP verification to activate your account.

description: Tour the home screen: courses / live classes / streak / XP.

flow: App Store / Play Store > Search Vacademy > Install

description: Pick which alerts you want from the platform.

title: How to switch the app language
description: Use the app in your preferred language.

description: Open the list of courses you are enrolled in.

description: Begin a chapter and view its slides.

description: Track progress slide by slide.

description: See who teaches your course.

description: See your calendar of live classes.

description: Check your attendance percentage per session.

title: How to book a session slot

description: Reserve a slot for office hours / 1:1 sessions.

description: Begin a timed assessment.

title: How to view your assessment scores
description: See your total score and pass / fail status.

title: How to view the marks breakdown
description: See marks per question and per section.

description: Compare your answers vs the correct ones.

title: How to request re-evaluation
description: Ask an instructor to re-check your grading.

description: Take a no-stakes practice attempt.

description: See all past attempts in one place.

title: How to attempt a coding question
flow: Learner App > Courses > [Coding Slide] > Run Code
description: Write code in the in-app editor and run it against test cases.

title: How to view your coding submission history
description: See past attempts and pass / fail results.

title: How to ask a doubt on a chapter
flow: Learner App > Courses > [Chapter] > Ask a Doubt
description: Submit a question to your instructor.

title: How to view replies to your doubts
description: Check instructor responses.

title: How to attach an image or PDF to a doubt
description: Include a photo of your work with your question.

description: Get instant AI-powered answers to your questions.

title: How to view your doubt history
description: See all your past doubts and resolutions.

title: How to view your invoices
description: See all your invoices in one place.

title: How to make a fee payment
description: Pay an invoice using UPI / card / netbanking.

title: How to use a coupon code at checkout
flow: Learner App > My Payments > Checkout > Apply Coupon
description: Apply a discount before paying.

title: How to view your payment history
description: See all completed and pending payments.

title: How to download a payment receipt
flow: Learner App > My Payments > [Invoice] > Download Receipt
description: Get a printable receipt.

title: How to view upcoming installments
description: See what's due next and when.

title: How to set up auto-pay for installments
description: Schedule automatic payment of installments.

title: How to update your profile
description: Change your name / photo / details.

title: How to upload a profile picture
description: Add a profile photo.

title: How to change your password
flow: Learner App > Profile > Security > Change Password
description: Update your account password.

title: How to enable two-factor authentication
description: Add an extra security step at login.

title: How to manage notification preferences
description: Pick which alerts you want to receive.

title: How to enable privacy screen on mobile
flow: Learner App > Profile > Privacy > Privacy Screen
description: Block screenshots and screen recording.

title: How to view your parent / guardian details
description: Manage parent / guardian contact info.

title: How to add additional contact info
description: Add backup phone / email.

title: How to view your notifications
description: See system / course / payment / message alerts.

title: How to mark notifications as read
description: Clear out the unread queue.

title: How to filter notifications by type
description: Show only payment / message / class alerts.

title: How to access your files
description: Open files shared by your institute or saved by you.

title: How to organize your files into folders
description: Create folders to keep materials tidy.

title: How to download a shared file
description: Save a shared file to your device.

title: How to view your performance report
description: See progress / scores / attendance over time.

title: How to share a report with your parent
description: Send a snapshot to a parent or guardian.

title: How to view subject-wise insights
description: Drill into how you are doing in each subject.

title: How to view your test rank in the cohort
description: Compare your performance with peers anonymously.

title: How to view your active membership
description: See your subscription plan and renewal date.

title: How to renew or upgrade your plan
description: Move to a higher tier or extend your current plan.

title: How to cancel your subscription
description: End your active subscription.

description: Save and share your completion certificates.

description: Post your achievement on LinkedIn.

description: Participate in cohort discussions.

title: How to follow other learners
description: Build a learning network inside your cohort.

title: How to ask a question in the community
description: Post a question to peers.

title: How to update the app over the air
flow: Learner App > Settings > About > Check for Updates
description: Pull the latest version without going to the store.

title: How to enable dark mode
flow: Learner App > Profile > Appearance > Dark Mode
description: Switch to dark theme.

title: How to clear app cache
flow: Learner App > Settings > Storage > Clear Cache
description: Free up space on your device.

title: How to submit feedback / report a bug
description: Send feedback or report issues.

title: How to contact your institute
description: Reach your institute admin team for support.

title: How to view FAQs
description: Browse the help center for common questions.

title: How to sign up and complete your profile
flow: Sign Up > Verify OTP > Profile > Edit > Upload Photo > Personal Details
description: Sign up with email or phone / verify OTP / fill in name & photo & details. The very first thing every new learner does.

title: How to navigate your dashboard
flow: Dashboard > My Courses + Live Classes + Streak + Notifications + Achievements
description: Tour the home screen so learners know where everything lives: courses / live class calendar / streak counter / notifications / achievements.

title: How to take your first course
flow: My Courses > [Course] > [Chapter] > Slide > Mark Complete > Download PDF > Offline Access
description: The core learner flow: open a course / start a chapter / view slides / mark complete / download materials / enable offline access for travel or low-signal.

title: How to join and follow up on a live class
flow: Live Sessions > Upcoming > Join > Past > Watch Recording > Attendance
description: View your schedule of live classes / join one at the right time / re-watch the recording afterwards / check your attendance percentage.

title: How to take an assessment
flow: Assessments > [Assessment] > Start > Attempt > Submit > Result > Marks Breakdown > Response Analysis
description: The complete assessment flow: start a timed test / attempt questions / submit / see your score / view marks per section / review your answers vs correct ones.

title: How to ask a doubt and use the AI tutor
flow: Courses > [Chapter] > Ask Doubt > Attach Photo > AI Tutor > Replies
description: Two ways to get help: ask your instructor a doubt with a photo of your work / OR use the AI Tutor for instant 24/7 answers.

title: How to make a payment
flow: My Payments > Invoices > [Invoice] > Pay > UPI/Card/Netbanking > Receipt > History
description: Pay an invoice using UPI / card / netbanking / download the receipt / view your payment history. Covers everything about money in the app.

title: How to update your profile and notification settings
flow: Profile > Edit > Photo + Password + 2FA + Notifications + Privacy Screen
description: Manage your account: update details / change password / enable two-factor auth / pick which notifications you want / turn on privacy screen on mobile.

title: How to use the mobile app like a pro
flow: Install > Offline Download > Dark Mode > OTA Updates
description: Install on iOS or Android / pre-download chapters for offline study / switch to dark mode / pull the latest app version without going to the store.

title: How to view your reports and certificates
flow: My Reports > Performance + Subjects > My Certificates > Download > Share to LinkedIn
description: Track your performance over time / drill into subject-wise insights / download your completion certificates / share achievements on LinkedIn.
